inline_comments: Normalize a POSIX host path: resolve `.`, `..`, collapse `//`, strip trailing `/`.
Resolve a path through the deepest existing ancestor so parent symlinks are honored even when the final source leaf does not exist yet.

functions.name: normalizeSandboxHostPath
functions.doc: Normalize a POSIX host path: resolve `.`, `..`, collapse ``, strip trailing ``.
